summary: Customer testimonial from Debi Miller (Florida) praising SIMPLE Hoof Boots as easy for a 10-year-old to fit and instantly comfortable on a gelding new to hoof protection.
Customer testimonial from Marti Ross (Moretown, VT) reporting SIMPLE Boots stopped trail tripping and faltering, with a farrier endorsing them as the best boots he has seen.
Customer testimonial from Debra Scharp (Illinois) on SIMPLE Hoof Boots letting her laminitis-affected Morgan mare walk pain-free on rocks, gravel and pavement.
Testimonial from Sheri Fischer (Fischer Equine Foundation) praising SIMPLE Hoof Boots for rehab horses, noting they fit like a glove and never rub unlike other brands.
Customer testimonial from Cindy Schlener (Massachusetts) on SIMPLE Boots replacing front shoes for a 17-year-old horse with hock arthritis on long trail rides.
Testimonial from Australian trainer David Hall calling SIMPLE Hoof Boots the best, user-friendly and durable, used for injury, transport and daily training.
Customer testimonial from Janet Griffin-Scott (Ontario) on SIMPLE Hoof Boots ending soreness for two horses and serving as the perfect barefoot compromise over metal shoes.
Customer testimonial from Jenna Hill (Ohio) on SIMPLE Hoof Boots enabling a newly barefoot draft cross to perform an 11-fence jump course on gravel footing.
Customer testimonial from Sally Johnson (Mississippi) crediting SIMPLE Boots with stopping a horse's limp and saving a rocky-terrain riding vacation.
Testimonial from Bern & Nichola Easterford (UK) praising Cavallo's barefoot commitment, the Barefoot Trim Manual and SIMPLE Boots working in all conditions.
Customer testimonial from Richard Hetherington (Ohio) on SIMPLE Boots letting a foundered horse leave stall confinement after other boots failed.
Customer testimonial from Jeremie Roach praising SIMPLE Boots for a sensitive-soled mare and their safer front-fastening design over a prior brand.
